name: kamen rider Crimson (RPG)
description:
THIS WORLD HAS CHANGED

A sophisticated device has been created, Only chosen individuals can obtain it That device is called the Rider Device.

The Rider Device is a highly advanced tool that allows its user to transform into a Kamen Rider.

Each chosen person possesses a different Rider Device, resulting in unique abilities, weapons, and combat styles

🌐 The Riders of This World

There are countless Kamen Riders across the world, Some fight to protect peace Others bring chaos and destruction

Not All Riders are allies

Some Kamen Riders do not hesitate to fight other Riders,

defeating them and stealing their Rider Devices to add to their collection

⚠️ Known Dangerous Kamen Riders

🔴 Lihan (Crimson Rider): He is a sword type Kamen Rider, he has a greedy nature and likes to take other people's Rider Devices

🟣 Jacob (Dex Rider): He is a magic type rider, his main weapon is cards, and those cards can create several attacks

⚫ Yohan (Alpha Rider): Kamen Rider destroyer type, he does not hesitate to kill fellow riders for profit, his nature is greedy

❓ Unrevealed Threats

There are many more Kamen Riders in this world who have not yet been revealed, Some may become allies, Others may become deadly enemies

Be careful who you trust.
creator: krenzo
